use_cases: Building scroll-driven animations and parallax effects in React applications
Creating scroll-triggered reveal animations for landing pages
Implementing scroll-based storytelling and animated content sections
Developing interactive data visualizations with scroll-linked motion
Adding smooth, physics-based scroll animations to web interfaces
ai_summary: A scroll animation utility system built with Framer Motion that provides context-based scroll progress tracking and reusable components for scroll-driven animations. Includes ScrollAnimation provider, ScrollTranslateY, and ScrollTranslateX components with spring physics and reduced motion support. Designed as a developer tool for building interactive, scroll-linked UIs with parallax and reveal effects.
